name: Italian Pasta and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 medium carrot, peeled, cut into 1/4-inch dice
1 large celery stalk, cut into 1/4-inch dice
4 cups great northern beans, cooked (1-1/2 cup Dry)
7 cups cooking liquid from beans or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over beans and rinse thoroughly. Place the 1 1/2 cups of beans in a large bowl with 4 times more water than beans and leave to soak overnight.
2. Drain off the soaking water and place the beans in a heavy skillet or saucepan with the specified amount of water. Bring the beans to a boil, then lower the heat, cover, and simmer until tender.
3. Heat the olive oil in a soup pot. Add the onion, garlic, carrot, and celery and sauté over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the onion is golden.
4. Add the beans, cooking liquid or water, zucchini, bay leaves, herb mix, and tomato paste. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer gently covered until the zucchini is just tender (about 10 minutes).
5. Remove from the heat and allow the soup to stand for an hour or so to develop flavor.
6. In a separate saucepan, cook the pasta al dente. Rinse briefly under cool water until it stops steaming.
7. Add the parsley to the soup and heat through. When the soup is hot, add the cooked pasta and season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve at once.
